title: MCA Jobs 2026 – General Manager, Deputy General Manager
shortInfo: Dedicated Freight Corridor Corporation of India Limited (DFCCIL) Recruitment 2026 for 5 posts of General Manager, Deputy General Manager. Candidates with B.E./B.Tech, MCA Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 01-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through DFCCIL official website dfccil.com.

basic_details.job_title: DFCCIL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for General Manager, Deputy General Manager Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Dedicated Freight Corridor Corporation of India Limited
basic_details.short_information: Dedicated Freight Corridor Corporation of India Limited (DFCCIL) Recruitment 2026 for 5 posts of General Manager, Deputy General Manager. Candidates with B.E./B.Tech, MCA Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 01-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through DFCCIL official website dfccil.com.

application_fee.details: General Manager (Mechanical): Maximum 57 years General Manager (Safety): Maximum 57 years General Manager (Law): Maximum 57 years Deputy General Manager (IT): Maximum 55 years

age_limit.maximum_age: Max 57 years for General Manager, Max 55 years for Deputy General Manager
age_limit.age_details: Max 57 years for General Manager, Max 55 years for Deputy General Manager
age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the DFCCIL Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech. or equivalent in relevant discipline, Bachelor's degree in law, B.E./B.Tech. in Computer Science/IT/Electronics or MCA.
qualification.details: General Manager (Mechanical): B.E./B.Tech. or equivalent qualification in Mechanical Engineering from a recognized University or Institution. Extensive working knowledge within Railway Mechanical Engineering Department at Workshop/ Division levels, with specific expertise in Carriage & Wagon (C&W) Maintenance & operations. General Manager (Safety): B.E. / B.Tech. or equivalent qualification in relevant discipline or relevant Graduation degree for officers working in Operating department in IR / other PSUs of IR from a recognized University or Institution. Minimum 03 years of experience in Safety Department in Indian Railways (IR) or DFCCIL or Other PUs / PSUs of Indian Railways OR should be currently working in Safety Department in IR or DFCCIL or Other PUs / PSUs of Indian Railways. Sound understanding of railway safety rules, procedures, and best practices, along with proven administrative capability. General Manager (Law): Full time regular bachelor's degree in law with minimum 50% marks from recognized University/Institute in India. Experience in handling Arbitrations (including commercial arbitration) & Conciliation matters, Industrial/Labour/Commercial Law matters and other dispute resolution mechanisms. Drafting & Vetting various Legal or contractual documents, providing legal opinions, handling legal matters pertaining to Land Acquisition, Contractual disputes, Service and Regulatory matters etc. Handling litigation before various judicial and quasi-judicial forums. Deputy General Manager (IT): B.E. / B. Tech in Computer Science / Information Technology / Electronics Engineering OR M.C.A. (Master of Computer Applications) OR equivalent from a recognized University/Institution. Proven in-depth experience in one or more core IT functions: Networking (LAN/WAN) design/management, Application Development (Software Development Lifecycle), or Cloud/Hybrid Hosting management. Experience in handling public procurement procedures.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.dfccil.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Submit applications through proper channel requesting parent organization to forward application along with NOC, D&AR and Vigilance Clearance and APARs for the preceding 03 years.
Envelope containing the application should be superscribed "Application for the post of on Immediate Absorption basis”.
One envelope should contain only one application.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 01-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for DFCCIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt of applications for the DFCCIL Recruitment 2026 is June 1, 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available in DFCCIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the posts of General Manager and Deputy General Manager in the Dedicated Freight Corridor Corporation of India Limited (DFCCIL) for the year 2026.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the DFCCIL posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post. Generally, it includes B.E./B.Tech. or equivalent in relevant disciplines, a Bachelor's degree in law, or MCA. Specific details are available in the official notification.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the General Manager posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the General Manager posts is 57 years. For Deputy General Manager posts, the maximum age limit is 55 years.

faq.question: What is the application mode for DFCCIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the DFCCIL posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the General Manager posts is E-8 Level (Rs. 1,20,000-2,80,000), and for Deputy General Manager posts, it is E-5 Level (Rs. 80,000-2,20,000).

faq.question: What is the selection process for DFCCIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will include an interview and an assessment of the candidate's Annual Performance Appraisal Reports (APARs) for the preceding three years.

faq.question: Can candidates from State Government departments apply for these posts?
faq.answer: Yes, DFCCIL invites applications for immediate absorption from regular officers working in Central/State Government departments, PSUs, etc.

faq.question: What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational/experience certificates, along with NOC, D&AR, and Vigilance Clearance from their parent organization.

faq.question: Where can I download the application form for DFCCIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of DFCCIL, which is www.dfccil.com. It is also usually provided as an annexure in the official notification PDF.
